description: Detects path traversal risks in C++: ifstream/ofstream opened with dynamic paths from parameters, filesystem::path concatenation without canonical() sanitization. Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot verify path argument origin or canonical() presence without cross-statement data-flow analysis).

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify ifstream/ofstream are not opened with unsanitized dynamic paths, filesystem::path concatenation with user-controlled input is protected by std::filesystem::canonical() or weakly_canonical() to prevent directory traversal attacks
